text.tspan: A grounded evolution of the current Next.js monolith: explicit orchestration, specialized agents, Prisma-backed memory, local job execution, and
the same Gemini/Veo, FFmpeg, and YouTube integrations already present in the repo.
The existing Next.js monolith remains intact. Route handlers and in-process jobs now hand work to an explicit
A central Orchestrator Agent owns workflow state and delegates control to specialized agents that wrap the current
No invented infrastructure. Memory comes from Prisma + SQLite records, tools come from the current local-first
runtime, and jobs still run in process.
